sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers la qualification par un nom (à = purpose / de = content-function / en = material, incl. tasse à/de café trap), relatives simples & composées in fluent description, estate-agent adjectives, housing lexicon (locataire/propriétaire/loyer/charges/aménager/rénover). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 3 'Domicile' ('La qualification par un nom', p.45; 'Construire et aménager', p.43; thème: l'habitat). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
